name: Goblin Scout
subtitle: A sneaky little menace with a rusty blade
lore: Degenerate scouts of the ruins. They speak in a rusted tongue reminiscent of the Green Emperor's old guard, suggesting they were once proud sentinels of the Vale before the Nexus shattered.

name: Giant Bat
subtitle: A shrieking beast that hunts in total darkness

name: Giant Rat
subtitle: A bloated sewer dweller with plague-ridden teeth

name: Spore Mushroom
subtitle: A toxic fungus that releases blinding clouds

name: Fire Imp
subtitle: A mischievous little devil with scorching hands

name: Armored Crab
subtitle: A coastal beast with nearly impenetrable shell

name: Dire Wolf
subtitle: A massive black wolf that hunts in the shadow
lore: Prowlers of the Twilight Groves. Their fur is unnaturally dark, woven from the literal shadows cast by the Nexus shards. They don't just hunt; they erase.

name: Poison Spider
subtitle: A web-spinning predator coated in venom
lore: Web-spinners of the Shadow Reach. Their venom isn't biological—it's concentrated despair, extracted from the atmosphere of the rift.

name: Rotting Zombie
subtitle: A shambling undead spreading plague and misery
lore: The byproduct of a botched ritual to restart the Moonstone mines. They are empty biological shells, still trying to perform the mining labor they did in life.

name: Lost Wisp
subtitle: A wayward soul radiating corrosive spectral light
lore: Soul fragments cast adrift during the Great Shattering. They are drawn to the living, seeking the warmth and cohesion they lost when the world broke.

name: Lizardman Scout
subtitle: A scaled warrior from the swamp tribes
lore: Former guardians of the Sunken Temple's exterior. They have turned hostile as the waters rise, believing the 'Shattered Souls' are heralds of a second, final flood.

name: Road Bandit
subtitle: A ruthless highwayman who fights dirty
lore: Survivalists who have abandoned morality in the wake of the apocalypse. They scavenge the Shadow Reach, clinging to 'Old World' gold that has lost all value in the new age.

name: Cursed Scarecrow
subtitle: An animated effigy imbued with harvest magic
lore: Effigies built by the peasants of the Ember Wastes to ward off Fire Imps. Ironically, the lingering ash and grief have given them a vengeful, mindless life of their own.

name: Toxic Slime
subtitle: A bubbling mass of corrosive ooze

name: Bone Knight
subtitle: An undead warrior animated by dark magic

name: Storm Harpy
subtitle: A winged predator that rides lightning

name: Phantom Ghost
subtitle: A wailing spirit that chills the soul

name: Deep Merman
subtitle: A corrupted sea dweller from the abyss

name: Swamp Witch
subtitle: A cackling crone who traffics in dark hexes

name: Werewolf
subtitle: A cursed warrior who transforms under moonlight

name: Crimson Vampire
subtitle: An ancient noble who feeds on life force

name: Medusa
subtitle: A serpentine gorgon whose gaze turns flesh to stone

name: Orc Berserker
subtitle: A raging brute who lives for the thrill of battle

name: Naga Warrior
subtitle: A serpent-warrior who commands dark water magic

name: Centaur Archer
subtitle: A half-human warrior with deadly aim and iron hooves

name: Stone Gargoyle
subtitle: A demonic sentinel carved from living rock

name: Cave Cyclops
subtitle: A one-eyed giant with devastating crushing power

name: Iron Minotaur
subtitle: A bull-headed juggernaut clad in forged iron

name: Stone Basilisk
subtitle: A petrifying lizard of immense power

name: Armored Ogre
subtitle: A mountain of muscle draped in stolen plate mail

name: Swamp Troll
subtitle: A regenerating horror dredged from the bog

name: Lesser Demon
subtitle: A fragment of hell given grotesque form

name: Stone Golem
subtitle: An ancient construct of living rock

name: Fire Elemental
subtitle: A living inferno with no mercy and no form

name: Iron Golem
subtitle: A construct of cold iron and ancient runes

name: Dark Knight
subtitle: A fallen warrior consumed by shadow

name: Venom Wyvern
subtitle: A serpentine dragon dripping with acid

name: Ancient Lich
subtitle: An immortal sorcerer who cheated death itself

name: Chimera Beast
subtitle: A three-headed nightmare of lion, goat and dragon

name: Death Necromancer
subtitle: A master of death magic who raises the fallen

name: Dark Phoenix
subtitle: A reborn firebird twisted by shadow corruption

name: Sea Kraken
subtitle: A colossal deep-sea terror with crushing tentacles

name: Stone Titan
subtitle: A primordial giant who shakes the earth with each step

name: Demon Lord
subtitle: A prince of the underworld bathed in hellfire

name: Bone Dragon
subtitle: An undead leviathan whose breath reaps life

name: Flesh Abomination
subtitle: A horrific mass of stitched bodies and madness

name: Void Knight
subtitle: A warrior erased from existence and reborn in darkness

name: Fallen Angel
subtitle: A divine being cast down and corrupted beyond salvation

name: Shadow Emperor
subtitle: The supreme ruler of all darkness — the final reckoning

name: Shadow Dragon
subtitle: A legendary beast of flame and darkness
